void-grimoire.description: Meta skills — prompt expansion, self-learning, skill optimization, multi-agent orchestration

tools.description: External CLI tool wrappers — preflight checks, invocation patterns, fallbacks. Codex, omp, adhd, herdr, agent-browser, chrome-devtools-mcp.

qa.description: Evidence-based verification of UI work — drive a browser, capture screenshots/console/network, write a report. Read-on-demand.

docs.description: Documentation lookup and indexing via qmd

codebase.description: Codebase structure awareness — service topology, dependency graphs

workflow.description: Lightweight workflow helpers — requirements validation, session journaling, usage feedback

npm.description: NPM package management and publishing safety

concilium.description: Multi-agent code review — parallel quality lenses (correctness, security, maintainability, scalability) plus evidence-gated self-correction, pragmatic and non-blocking

react.description: React-specific patterns — state management, hooks, component composition. Read-on-demand.

node.description: Node.js library wrappers — TypeScript-facing client patterns. Read-on-demand.

patterns.description: Stack-specific reference skills — Nest.js, Next.js Turbopack, Postgres, MCP servers, Framer Motion. Read-on-demand, not auto-loaded.
